texto: This is the thing about school dances. They make like it's supposed to be this other-worldly thing, but really it's just the people you see every day dressed up, standing in the gym in the dark with Red Hot Chili Peppers playing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mariko Tamaki: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “This is the thing about school dances. They make like it's supposed to be this other-worldly thin…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, teenagers, thing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de academia e reflexao-noturna.
